name: Kielbasa Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 pound kielbasa, sliced into 1/8 inch pieces
4 potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
3 teaspoons flour, stirred into the milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 2 cups of salted water to a boil. Add kielbasa slices and cook for 20 minutes or until tender.
2. Add chopped potatoes and continue cooking for another 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the shredded cabbage and simmer for an additional 10 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in the milk and flour mixture, then simmer for 10 more minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese. Simmer for a final 10 minutes until the cheese is melted and the sauce has thickened.
